title: CircleCI vs New Relic
description: Compare CircleCI vs New Relic in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right developer tools tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, CircleCI emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.3/5 rating compared to 4.2/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, CircleCI or New Relic?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, CircleCI edges ahead with a 4.3/5 rating. CircleCI excels at Continuous integration and delivery platform for automated builds., while New Relic is stronger for Full-stack observability platform for monitoring and troubleshooting..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between CircleCI and New Relic?
faqs.answer: CircleCI and New Relic differ in pricing ($30-200/mo vs $0.25/hour), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is CircleCI cheaper than New Relic?
faqs.answer: CircleCI starts at $30-200/mo while New Relic starts at $0.25/hour. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, CircleCI or New Relic?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for developer tools. CircleCI scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use CircleCI and New Relic together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, CircleCI or New Relic?
faqs.answer: Both CircleCI and New Relic prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which developer tools tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor New Relic for large teams, while CircleCI may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $30-200/mo pricing.
